# Title: Tax Registration Agreement (VAT or GST)

Title: Tax Registration Agreement (VAT or GST)

URL Source: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/G30394

Markdown Content:
This article applies to selling in: **United States**

If you operate a business established in any of the countries listed below 1 and have received a tax registration number from the tax authorities in that country, you can submit it. We will use this information to determine how tax 2 will apply on your seller fees and, where applicable, for other Amazon services provided to you.

Before submitting your tax registration number, you must read the following information carefully. You can only submit your tax registration number if you meet, acknowledge and agree to all these conditions:

*   You must operate a business established in any of the countries listed below 1 and have received a tax registration number from the tax authorities in that country.
*   The tax registration number and all other information you submit to Amazon is true, accurate and current and belongs to the business you operate and from which you are selling on Amazon. You will immediately update any such information held by us in case of any changes.
*   All transactions on your Amazon Seller Account will be business-related transactions made by the business associated with the tax registration number you submit to Amazon.
*   All information including your tax registration number will be collected, processed and maintained in accordance with the terms set out in the Amazon Services Business Solutions Agreement and Privacy Notice.

*   Amazon reserves the right to request additional information and to confirm the validity of your seller account information (including your tax registration number) from you or government authorities as permitted by law. You agree to provide any such information to us upon request.
*   Amazon reserves the right to charge you any applicable unbilled tax if you provide a tax registration number that is determined to be invalid. You irrevocably authorize Amazon to debit your credit card for any such unbilled tax.
*   For resident-Australian sellers only: By providing your Australian Business Number (ABN), you confirm that you are Goods and Services Tax (GST) registered.
*   For resident-Taiwan sellers only: By providing your Unified Business Number (UBN), you confirm that you are Value Added Tax (VAT) registered.
*   For resident-Quebec sellers only: By providing your QST number you confirm that you are QST registered since or before January 1, 2019.

*   For resident-Quebec sellers only: By providing your QST number you confirm that you are QST registered since or before January 1, 2019.
*   For sellers and advertiser’s resident in Nepal only: By providing your Nepal tax registration number, you confirm that the services you receive from Amazon are to be used only for business/professional purposes.

1 List of countries for which tax registration numbers are accepted:

• 27 European Union Member States

• Albania

• Armenia

• Australia (Australian Business Number)

• Bahamas

• Bahrain

• Bangladesh

• Barbados

• Belarus

• British Columbia

• Cambodia

• Cameroon

• Canada

• Canary Island

• Chile

• Colombia

• Costa Rica

• Egypt

• Georgia

• Ghana

• Iceland

• India

• Indonesia

• Japan

• Kazakhstan

• Kenya

• Kyrgyzstan

• Malaysia

• Moldova

• Nepal

• New Zealand

• Nigeria

• Norway

• Oman

• Quebec

• Russia (State Registration Number)

• Saskatchewan

• Saudi Arabia

• Serbia

• Singapore

• South Africa

• South Korea

• Switzerland & Busingen & Liechtenstein

• Taiwan (Unified Business Number)

• Tajikistan

• Thailand

• Turkey

• United Arab Emirate

• United Kingdom

• Uzbekistan

• Zimbabwe

2 VAT or GST, as applicable.
